t.t-nocache: Wishlist state depends on user and must not be shared between users.

div.t-attf-class: {{'d-none' if combination_info['prevent_zero_price_sale'] else 'd-flex'}} align-items-center w-100 w-xl-auto mt-3 mt-xl-0

input.class: form-control quantity text-center js_quantity border-start-0 border-end-0 shadow-none
input.name: add_qty

a.class: btn btn-link float_left js_add_cart_json border-start-0 shadow-none
a.title: زيادة الكمية

a.class: btn btn-md btn-cart btn-primary fw-bold two w-100

t.p: سجّل الدخول لإضافة المنتجات إلى سلتك

a.class: btn btn-md btn-cart btn-primary a-submit-btn ajax-cart-btn js_check_product fw-bold two w-100
btn btn-secondary btn-lg o_we_buy_now sticky_cart_button w-100 mt-2
btn btn-secondary btn-lg openpop buy_now_login sticky_cart_button w-100 mt-2
btn btn-secondary btn-lg buy_now_login sticky_cart_button w-100 mt-2
btn btn-secondary btn-lg o_we_buy_now sticky_cart_button w-100 mt-2
btn btn-secondary btn-lg o_we_buy_now sticky_cart_button w-100 mt-2
btn btn-secondary btn-lg openpop buy_now_login sticky_cart_button w-100 mt-2
btn btn-secondary btn-lg buy_now_login sticky_cart_button w-100 mt-2
btn btn-secondary btn-lg o_we_buy_now sticky_cart_button w-100 mt-2

t.t-nocache: The wishlist depends on the user and must not be shared with other users. The product come from the controller.

button.class: btn btn-link px-0 pe-3 o_add_wishlist_dyn d-none
button.title: أضف للمفضلة

div.p: لا يوجد خيار صالح لهذا المنتج.
